raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature is calling for a major investment in broadband infrastructure for Californians without reliable, affordable internet.",
    "The group is requesting a $500 million allocation from the American Rescue Plan to support the deployment of broadband municipal fiber networks by local governments.",
    "The Newsom administration’s Public Utilities Commission has estimated that bringing Californians up to federal broadband standards will require an investment of almost $6.8 billion.",
    "The Federal Communications Commission may update the broadband standard of 25 Mbps upload/25 Mbps download to greater speeds to accommodate improving computer technology.",
    "Higher broadband standards will require greater public investment to meet the needs of online education, Telehealth, and access to the Digital Economy.",
    "Access to the internet is considered an essential requirement for participating in today’s online world."
  ]
}
```
